description: CPU mode should expose c_eff/native job shape through SLURM_CPUS_PER_TASK and normalized job fields
script:
printenv SLURM_RSC_SPEC || true
printenv SLURM_RSC_C || true
printenv SLURM_RSC_C_EFF || true
printenv SLURM_CPUS_PER_TASK || true
printenv SLURM_NTASKS || true
printenv SLURM_TASKS_PER_NODE || true
